# Step 14: 差异表达区域（DER）

## 14.1 DER 结果表

```{r}
ensure_module_result_layout("14_der")

der_required_files <- c(
  file.path(der_dir, "all_ders.csv"),
  file.path(der_dir, "significant_ders.csv"),
  file.path(der_dir, "der_gene_summary.csv"),
  file.path(der_dir, "coverage_matrix.tsv")
)
if (!all(file.exists(der_required_files))) {
  stop("未找到完整 DER 结果，请先重新运行 bash rnaseq_third.sh。缺失文件: ", paste(basename(der_required_files[!file.exists(der_required_files)]), collapse = ", "))
}

if (nrow(der_all_regions) == 0) {
  der_all_regions <- read.csv(file.path(der_dir, "all_ders.csv"), check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
    filter_primary_chr_df()
}
if (nrow(der_sig_regions) == 0) {
  der_sig_regions <- read.csv(file.path(der_dir, "significant_ders.csv"), check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
    filter_primary_chr_df()
}
if (nrow(der_gene_summary_tbl) == 0) {
  der_gene_summary_tbl <- read.csv(file.path(der_dir, "der_gene_summary.csv"), check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}

coalesce_chr_columns <- function(tbl, cols, default = NA_character_) {
  out <- rep(default, nrow(tbl))
  for (one_col in cols[cols %in% colnames(tbl)]) {
    vals <- as.character(tbl[[one_col]])
    fill <- (is.na(out) | out == "") & !is.na(vals) & vals != ""
    out[fill] <- vals[fill]
  }
  out
}

coalesce_num_columns <- function(tbl, cols, default = NA_real_) {
  out <- rep(default, nrow(tbl))
  for (one_col in cols[cols %in% colnames(tbl)]) {
    vals <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(tbl[[one_col]]))
    fill <- !is.finite(out) & is.finite(vals)
    out[fill] <- vals[fill]
  }
  out
}

discover_der_gtf <- function() {
  candidates <- c(
    Sys.getenv("GTF_FILE", unset = ""),
    file.path(Sys.getenv("REFERENCE_DIR", unset = "/home/h1028/workspace/reference/GRCm39"), "Mus_musculus.GRCm39.115.gtf"),
    list.files("/home/h1028/workspace/reference/GRCm39", pattern = "Mus_musculus\\.GRCm39.*\\.gtf$", full.names = TRUE)[1]
  )
  candidates <- candidates[!is.na(candidates) & nzchar(candidates)]
  hit <- candidates[file.exists(candidates)]
  if (length(hit) == 0) NA_character_ else hit[[1]]
}

annotate_der_nearest_genes <- function(der_tbl) {
  required_cols <- c("region_id", "seqnames", "start", "end")
  missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, colnames(der_tbl))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    return(data.frame(status = paste0("skipped_missing_der_columns:", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ","))))
  }
  gtf_file <- discover_der_gtf()
  if (is.na(gtf_file) || !file.exists(gtf_file)) {
    return(data.frame(status = "skipped_missing_gtf"))
  }
  pkg_state <- try_install_and_load(c("GenomicRanges", "IRanges", "rtracklayer"), bioc = TRUE)
  if (!isTRUE(pkg_state$ok)) {
    return(data.frame(status = paste0("skipped_missing_packages:", paste(pkg_state$missing, collapse = ","))))
  }

  der_valid <- der_tbl %>%
    mutate(
      .row_id = row_number(),
      .seqnames = as.character(seqnames),
      .start = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(start)),
      .end = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(end))
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(region_id), region_id != "", !is.na(.seqnames), .seqnames != "", is.finite(.start), is.finite(.end), .end >= .start)
  if (nrow(der_valid) == 0) {
    return(data.frame(status = "skipped_no_valid_der_ranges"))
  }

  gtf_gr <- tryCatch(rtracklayer::import(gtf_file), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(gtf_gr)) {
    return(data.frame(status = "skipped_gtf_import_failed"))
  }
  gtf_type <- as.character(S4Vectors::mcols(gtf_gr)$type)
  if (length(gtf_type) != length(gtf_gr)) {
    gtf_type <- rep(NA_character_, length(gtf_gr))
  }
  gene_gr <- gtf_gr[gtf_type == "gene"]
  if (length(gene_gr) == 0) {
    gene_gr <- gtf_gr[!is.na(S4Vectors::mcols(gtf_gr)$gene_id)]
  }
  if (length(gene_gr) == 0) {
    return(data.frame(status = "skipped_no_gene_features_in_gtf"))
  }

  gene_levels <- GenomeInfoDb::seqlevels(gene_gr)
  der_has_chr <- any(grepl("^chr", der_valid$.seqnames))
  gene_has_chr <- any(grepl("^chr", gene_levels))
  if (der_has_chr && !gene_has_chr) {
    gene_gr <- GenomeInfoDb::`seqlevels<-`(gene_gr, paste0("chr", gene_levels))
  } else if (!der_has_chr && gene_has_chr) {
    gene_gr <- GenomeInfoDb::`seqlevels<-`(gene_gr, sub("^chr", "", gene_levels))
  }

  der_gr <- GenomicRanges::GRanges(
    seqnames = der_valid$.seqnames,
    ranges = IRanges::IRanges(start = der_valid$.start, end = der_valid$.end)
  )
  nearest_idx <- GenomicRanges::nearest(der_gr, gene_gr, ignore.strand = TRUE)
  keep <- !is.na(nearest_idx)
  if (!any(keep)) {
    return(data.frame(status = "skipped_no_nearest_gene_hits"))
  }
  nearest_gene_gr <- gene_gr[nearest_idx[keep]]
  gene_meta <- as.data.frame(S4Vectors::mcols(nearest_gene_gr), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  gene_id <- coalesce_chr_columns(gene_meta, c("gene_id", "ID", "Name"))
  gene_symbol <- coalesce_chr_columns(gene_meta, c("gene_name", "gene_symbol", "Name", "gene_id"))
  distance_bp <- IRanges::distance(der_gr[keep], nearest_gene_gr)
  data.frame(
    region_id = der_valid$region_id[keep],
    nearest_gene_id_clean = sub("\\.[0-9]+$", "", gene_id),
    nearest_gene_symbol = gene_symbol,
    nearest_gene_seqnames = as.character(GenomicRanges::seqnames(nearest_gene_gr)),
    nearest_gene_start = start(nearest_gene_gr),
    nearest_gene_end = end(nearest_gene_gr),
    distance_to_nearest_gene = as.numeric(distance_bp),
    gtf_file = gtf_file,
    status = "ok",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

der_all_regions$gene_id_clean <- sub("\\.[0-9]+$", "", coalesce_chr_columns(der_all_regions, c("gene_id_clean", "gene_id", "gene_name")))
der_all_regions$gene_label <- coalesce_chr_columns(der_all_regions, c("gene_name", "gene_label", "gene_id_clean"))
der_all_regions$der_effect <- coalesce_num_columns(der_all_regions, c("der_effect", "logFC"))
der_all_regions$region_width <- coalesce_num_columns(der_all_regions, c("width"))
if (all(c("start", "end") %in% colnames(der_all_regions))) {
  missing_width <- !is.finite(der_all_regions$region_width)
  der_all_regions$region_width[missing_width] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(der_all_regions$end[missing_width]) - as.numeric(der_all_regions$start[missing_width]) + 1)
}
if ("significant_der" %in% colnames(der_all_regions)) {
  der_all_regions$significant_der <- as.logical(der_all_regions$significant_der)
} else {
  der_all_regions$significant_der <- FALSE
}
if ("P.Value" %in% colnames(der_all_regions)) {
  missing_sig <- is.na(der_all_regions$significant_der)
  der_pvalue_num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(der_all_regions$P.Value))
  # 保留当前项目 DER nominal pvalue < 0.05 口径；更严格汇报时建议同步查看 adj.P.Val / best_der_padj。
  der_all_regions$significant_der[missing_sig] <- is.finite(der_pvalue_num[missing_sig]) & der_pvalue_num[missing_sig] < 0.05
}
der_all_regions$significant_der[is.na(der_all_regions$significant_der)] <- FALSE

der_nearest_tbl <- annotate_der_nearest_genes(der_all_regions)
write.csv(der_nearest_tbl, file.path(step13_dir, "14_11_DER_nearest_gene_annotation.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
if (nrow(der_nearest_tbl) > 0 && all(c("region_id", "nearest_gene_id_clean", "nearest_gene_symbol") %in% colnames(der_nearest_tbl))) {
  der_all_regions <- der_all_regions %>%
    left_join(
      der_nearest_tbl %>%
        dplyr::select(region_id, nearest_gene_id_clean, nearest_gene_symbol, distance_to_nearest_gene),
      by = "region_id"
    )
  missing_direct_gene <- is.na(der_all_regions$gene_id_clean) | der_all_regions$gene_id_clean == "" | der_all_regions$gene_id_clean == "NA"
  has_nearest_gene <- !is.na(der_all_regions$nearest_gene_id_clean) & der_all_regions$nearest_gene_id_clean != "" & der_all_regions$nearest_gene_id_clean != "NA"
  der_all_regions$gene_assignment_source <- ifelse(missing_direct_gene & has_nearest_gene, "nearest_gene", "direct_or_unassigned")
  fill_nearest <- missing_direct_gene & has_nearest_gene
  der_all_regions$gene_id_clean[fill_nearest] <- der_all_regions$nearest_gene_id_clean[fill_nearest]
  der_all_regions$gene_label[fill_nearest] <- der_all_regions$nearest_gene_symbol[fill_nearest]
}

der_all_regions <- der_all_regions %>%
  arrange(P.Value, desc(abs(der_effect)))
der_sig_regions <- der_all_regions %>% filter(significant_der)
der_sig_ids <- unique(stats::na.omit(der_sig_regions$gene_id_clean))

der_gene_summary_tbl$gene_id_clean <- sub("\\.[0-9]+$", "", coalesce_chr_columns(der_gene_summary_tbl, c("gene_id_clean", "gene_id", "gene_name")))
der_gene_summary_tbl$gene_label <- coalesce_chr_columns(der_gene_summary_tbl, c("gene_name", "gene_label", "gene_id_clean"))
der_gene_summary_tbl$best_der_pvalue <- coalesce_num_columns(der_gene_summary_tbl, c("best_der_pvalue"))
der_gene_summary_tbl$best_der_padj <- coalesce_num_columns(der_gene_summary_tbl, c("best_der_padj"))
der_gene_summary_tbl$max_abs_der_effect <- coalesce_num_columns(der_gene_summary_tbl, c("max_abs_der_effect"))

der_gene_summary_tbl <- der_gene_summary_tbl %>%
  arrange(best_der_pvalue, desc(max_abs_der_effect))
if (nrow(der_gene_summary_tbl) == 0 || all(is.na(der_gene_summary_tbl$gene_id_clean) | der_gene_summary_tbl$gene_id_clean == "" | der_gene_summary_tbl$gene_id_clean == "NA")) {
  der_gene_summary_tbl <- der_all_regions %>%
    filter(!is.na(gene_id_clean), gene_id_clean != "", gene_id_clean != "NA") %>%
    group_by(gene_id_clean, gene_label) %>%
    summarise(
      der_region_count = n(),
      significant_der_region_count = sum(significant_der, na.rm = TRUE),
      best_der_pvalue = suppressWarnings(min(P.Value, na.rm = TRUE)),
      best_der_padj = suppressWarnings(min(adj.P.Val, na.rm = TRUE)),
      max_abs_der_effect = suppressWarnings(max(abs(der_effect), na.rm = TRUE)),
      representative_region = region_id[which.min(dplyr::coalesce(P.Value, Inf))][1],
      major_region_class = first_non_missing_chr(region_class),
      min_distance_to_nearest_gene = suppressWarnings(min(distance_to_nearest_gene, na.rm = TRUE)),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      best_der_pvalue = ifelse(is.infinite(best_der_pvalue), NA_real_, best_der_pvalue),
      best_der_padj = ifelse(is.infinite(best_der_padj), NA_real_, best_der_padj),
      max_abs_der_effect = ifelse(is.infinite(max_abs_der_effect), NA_real_, max_abs_der_effect),
      min_distance_to_nearest_gene = ifelse(is.infinite(min_distance_to_nearest_gene), NA_real_, min_distance_to_nearest_gene)
    ) %>%
    arrange(best_der_pvalue, desc(max_abs_der_effect))
}
if (nrow(der_all_regions) > 0 && nrow(der_gene_summary_tbl) > 0) {
  der_gene_summary_tbl <- der_gene_summary_tbl %>%
    filter(gene_id_clean %in% unique(stats::na.omit(der_all_regions$gene_id_clean)))
}

der_overlap_summary <- make_overlap_summary(der_sig_ids, unique(de_result$ensembl_id[de_result$direction != "ns"]), "DER", "DE")
write.csv(der_all_regions, file.path(step13_dir, "14_1_all_DERs.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(der_sig_regions, file.path(step13_dir, "14_2_significant_DERs.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(der_gene_summary_tbl, file.path(step13_dir, "14_3_DER_gene_summary.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(der_overlap_summary, file.path(step13_dir, "14_4_DE_DER_overlap_summary.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```

## 14.2 DER 图表

```{r}
if (nrow(der_all_regions) > 0) {
  der_class_tbl <- der_all_regions %>%
    count(region_class, name = "region_count") %>%
    arrange(desc(region_count), region_class)
  write.csv(der_class_tbl, file.path(step13_dir, "14_5_DER_region_class_summary.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

  der_class_plot <- ggplot(der_class_tbl, aes(x = reorder(region_class, region_count), y = region_count, fill = region_class)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.75) +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = resolve_named_colors(viz_pal$accent, der_class_tbl$region_class)) +
    labs(title = "DER genomic class distribution", x = NULL, y = "Region count") +
    theme_rnaseq_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "none")
  save_plot_versions(der_class_plot, file.path(step13_dir, "14_6_DER_region_class_distribution.pdf"), width = 7, height = 4.5)

  der_width_plot <- ggplot(der_all_regions, aes(x = region_width, fill = significant_der)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 40, alpha = 0.8, position = "identity") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = viz_rekey_colors(viz_pal$sig_status, c("TRUE" = "significant", "FALSE" = "ns"))) +
    labs(title = "DER width distribution", x = "Region width", y = "Count", fill = "Significant") +
    theme_rnaseq_minimal()
  save_plot_versions(der_width_plot, file.path(step13_dir, "14_7_DER_width_distribution.pdf"), width = 8, height = 5)

  top_der_plot <- der_all_regions %>%
    filter(is.finite(P.Value), is.finite(der_effect)) %>%
    arrange(P.Value, desc(abs(der_effect))) %>%
    slice_head(n = 20) %>%
    mutate(region_label = factor(region_id, levels = rev(region_id))) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = region_label, y = -log10(P.Value + 1e-300), fill = der_effect)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.75) +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_fill_heatmap_diverging(midpoint = 0) +
    labs(title = "Top DER ranking", x = NULL, y = "-log10(PValue)", fill = "Effect") +
    theme_rnaseq_minimal()
  save_plot_versions(top_der_plot, file.path(step13_dir, "14_8_top_DER_ranking.pdf"), width = 8.5, height = 6.5)

  der_cov_mat <- read.delim(file.path(der_dir, "coverage_matrix.tsv"), row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)
  der_cov_mat <- der_cov_mat[rownames(der_cov_mat) %in% der_all_regions$region_id, , drop = FALSE]
  if (nrow(der_cov_mat) >= 2) {
    top_regions <- der_sig_regions %>% slice_head(n = min(30, nrow(der_sig_regions))) %>% pull(region_id)
    top_regions <- top_regions[top_regions %in% rownames(der_cov_mat)]
    if (length(top_regions) >= 2) {
      der_heat_mat <- as.matrix(der_cov_mat[top_regions, , drop = FALSE])
      der_heat_mat <- safe_scale_rows(log2(der_heat_mat + 1))
      save_base_pdf_versions(
        primary = file.path(step13_dir, "14_9_DER_coverage_heatmap.pdf"),
        width = 8.5,
        height = 10,
        expr = ComplexHeatmap::draw(
          ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(
            der_heat_mat,
            name = "z-score",
            col = heatmap_diverging_col_fun(der_heat_mat),
            top_annotation = heatmap_group_annotation(sample_info$group),
            cluster_rows = TRUE,
            cluster_columns = TRUE,
            column_names_rot = 45
          )
        )
      )
    }
  }

  der_overlap_plot <- ggplot(der_overlap_summary, aes(x = category, y = count, fill = category)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.75) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = viz_pal$overlap[c("DER_only", "DE_only", "DER_and_DE")]) +
    labs(title = "DE 与 DER overlap", x = NULL, y = "Gene count") +
    theme_rnaseq_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "none")
  save_plot_versions(der_overlap_plot, file.path(step13_dir, "14_10_DE_DER_overlap_barplot.pdf"), width = 7, height = 4.5)
}
```
